nodes.label: AI for documentation efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: forcing myself to use a conversational format by storing this information in an AI model allows me to recall it better at a later time than a blank list of numbers

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: If i get started in an AI conversation and go through the entire thing without some rush, incident, or customer interrupting me the extra time feels well worth it, but i get interrupted often enough that it ends up feeling quite jarring

nodes.label: AI for operational efficiency and workload balancing
nodes.grounding_span: i would really love it if AI could handle employee scheduling

nodes.label: AI as tool for self-sufficiency and competence
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to personal competence
nodes.grounding_span: I would put limits to how much of my mind i outsource to AI, particularly with memorization and trust in my own knowledge

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: Taking extra time to do anything on my phone is time taken away from managing screening officers

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: its super important to keep that sharp and not depend on AI

nodes.label: Situational awareness and coordination
nodes.grounding_span: unite the managers so we all have more of a birdseye view of whats going on checkpoint by checkpoint

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: i would really love it if AI could handle employee scheduling

nodes.label: Frustration with AI notification overload
nodes.grounding_span: i ended up losing track of what i needed to include multiple times, causing a huge time loss

nodes.label: Resistance to outsourcing teaching to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I would put limits to how much of my mind i outsource to AI

nodes.label: Pragmatic tool switching
nodes.grounding_span: once the time pressure is cranked up the shorthand becomes necessary to get things done in satisfactory time

nodes.label: Strategic delegation with oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I would put limits to how much of my mind i outsource to AI, particularly with memorization and trust in my own knowledge
